title: Add Tickflow policy controls for persistence and retries
description: Wire config policies into supervisor decisions: max_attempts, max_no_progress_attempts, max_same_verifier_failures, require_commit, require_verifiers_for_priority, sandbox default, and secrets exposure behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Supervisor honors configured max attempts and verifier failure limits; policy choices appear in contract/status output; unsafe secret exposure defaults to none or explicit confirmation/config.
